reason_for_decision: The revised article now explains the adaptive-perception idea clearly enough and grounds the topic in architecture rather than hype, which is sufficient to pass.
strengths: The article now explains why adaptive sensing matters instead of relying on futuristic phrasing.
It connects FMCW LiDAR to selective perception and resource allocation in a technically credible way.
The piece keeps the emerging-technology topic grounded in practical system-design implications.
summary_assessment: This version passes under the stricter rubric. It is concise but now has enough structure, technical logic, and originality to be publishable.
